records.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, this is Kaci, who will be my daily assistant for the day on behalf of the AI J.O.U.R.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased...! To meet you all!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased...! To meet you all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're pleased to meet you too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're pleased to meet you too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're pleased to meet you too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... Wasn't that accident more Edith's fault because she was skipping class? I think it's karma coming to bite you back.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But... Wasn't that accident more Edith's fault because she was skipping class? I think it's karma coming to bite you back.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Skipping class? That's incorrect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My dream is that mankind will be able to sleep comfortably on a chair that flies horizontally. And I was personally conducting a test for the future of mankind.

records.m_Talk_FRA: My dream is that mankind will be able to sleep comfortably on a chair that flies horizontally. And I was personally conducting a test for the future of mankind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the first time I ever heard about such a dream. But didn't you bring Kaci along because you're too lazy and don't want to work?

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the first time I ever heard about such a dream. But didn't you bring Kaci along because you're too lazy and don't want to work?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the AI's down and we can't do a remote inspection, we'll have to go into the facility and check it out ourselves.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll take a look inside!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's going to be pitch-dark without any lights. Won't you be scared of being all alone in there?

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's going to be pitch-dark without any lights. Won't you be scared of being all alone in there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all right. I'm used to places like this, so it's actually quite comfortable.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all right. I'm used to places like this, so it's actually quite comfortable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I see. So Kaci's not the type to get startled when a scary monster jumps out from the dark.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Move along the pipe and you'll see a panel that can be manually operated.

records.m_Talk_FRA: A boogeyman might reach his hand out to you from the dark.

records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did you have to say that to me...?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... What do I do if a boogeyman really does come out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... What do I do if a boogeyman really does come out?

records.m_Talk_DEU: But... how did a bird even build a nest in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... how did a bird even build a nest in a place like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm guessing it came here looking for a safe place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm guessing it came here looking for a safe place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm guessing it came here looking for a safe place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although birds usually build their nests in trees with lush leaves, there aren't many good trees these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although birds usually build their nests in trees with lush leaves, there aren't many good trees these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although birds usually build their nests in trees with lush leaves, there aren't many good trees these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... I learned that in class. The lack of trees is... because of the Counterside Effect, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... I learned that in class. The lack of trees is... because of the Counterside Effect, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... I learned that in class. The lack of trees is... because of the Counterside Effect, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! That's correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! That's correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! That's correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though our generation never experienced it directly, the ecosystem is said to have changed a lot ever since the Counterside Effect occurred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though our generation never experienced it directly, the ecosystem is said to have changed a lot ever since the Counterside Effect occurred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though our generation never experienced it directly, the ecosystem is said to have changed a lot ever since the Counterside Effect occurred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There used to be migratory birds that would fly in flocks relocating to warmer climates, but with the seasons all mixed up, it's something you can't see these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There used to be migratory birds that would fly in flocks relocating to warmer climates, but with the seasons all mixed up, it's something you can't see these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There used to be migratory birds that would fly in flocks relocating to warmer climates, but with the seasons all mixed up, it's something you can't see these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's a shame that there aren't enough trees for birds to comfortably rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's a shame that there aren't enough trees for birds to comfortably rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's a shame that there aren't enough trees for birds to comfortably rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it's the same for people. We also don't have enough places to live. That's what the world has come to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it's the same for people. We also don't have enough places to live. That's what the world has come to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it's the same for people. We also don't have enough places to live. That's what the world has come to.

records.m_Talk_DEU: What should I do with the nest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What should I do with the nest?

records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll have to remove it if we want to fix the facility.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Shouldn't we move it to somewhere safer?

records.m_Talk_FRA: That won't help. Once the mother bird feels threatened and leaves, it is unlikely to return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's too bad. The Student President prepared us some snacks after she heard Kaci was helping us with Student Council work.

records.m_Talk_FRA: E-Edith? When did you get here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came to give you some snacks from the Student President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came to give you some snacks from the Student President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came to give you some snacks from the Student President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I ate some along the way, so there's only half of them left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I ate some along the way, so there's only half of them left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I ate some along the way, so there's only half of them left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... thank you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... thank you.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Those eggs, you didn't throw them away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those eggs, you didn't throw them away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. It's my fault, so I wanted to take the responsibility.

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. It's my fault, so I wanted to take the responsibility.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But you didn't do it on purpose. It couldn't be helped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you keep feeling responsible for every little thing, it's going to get only harder for you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If you keep feeling responsible for every little thing, it's going to get only harder for you.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe. But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe. But...

records.m_Talk_DEU: What I mean is, don't get too discouraged if the eggs don't hatch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I mean is, don't get too discouraged if the eggs don't hatch.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your concern, Edith.

records.m_Talk_DEU: A good idea?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Flowers! Trees! And... even the baby birds!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then it's settled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, you handed the responsibility of taking care of the backyard to Kaci?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! Even if you're that lazy! How can you let just one elementary school student be in charge of that large piece of land?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! Even if you're that lazy! How can you let just one elementary school student be in charge of that large piece of land?!

I don't think this is right. We should withdraw the decision and

records.m_Talk_ENG: Student President?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Counter Academy.

records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Counter Academy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she wants to do it, then I think it's best to give her more opportunities to discover what her strengths are.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If she wants to do it, then I think it's best to give her more opportunities to discover what her strengths are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edith! You didn't coax her because you were too lazy to do it, right?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Wake up! We still have work to do!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wake up! We still have work to do!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, this is Kaci, who will be my daily assistant for the day on behalf of the AI J.O.U.R.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...And so, this is Kaci, who will be my daily assistant for the day on behalf of the AI J.O.U.R.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...And so, this is Kaci, who will be my daily assistant for the day on behalf of the AI J.O.U.R.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased...! To meet you all!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pleased...! To meet you all!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased...! To meet you all!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're pleased to meet you too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're pleased to meet you too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're pleased to meet you too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... Wasn't that accident more Edith's fault because she was skipping class? I think it's karma coming to bite you back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... Wasn't that accident more Edith's fault because she was skipping class? I think it's karma coming to bite you back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... Wasn't that accident more Edith's fault because she was skipping class? I think it's karma coming to bite you back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Skipping class? That's incorrect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Skipping class? That's incorrect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Skipping class? That's incorrect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My dream is that mankind will be able to sleep comfortably on a chair that flies horizontally. And I was personally conducting a test for the future of mankind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My dream is that mankind will be able to sleep comfortably on a chair that flies horizontally. And I was personally conducting a test for the future of mankind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My dream is that mankind will be able to sleep comfortably on a chair that flies horizontally. And I was personally conducting a test for the future of mankind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the first time I ever heard about such a dream. But didn't you bring Kaci along because you're too lazy and don't want to work?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the first time I ever heard about such a dream. But didn't you bring Kaci along because you're too lazy and don't want to work?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the first time I ever heard about such a dream. But didn't you bring Kaci along because you're too lazy and don't want to work?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no! Edith said I didn't have to, but I insisted I wanted to help!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Is that so?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I'll tell you two what tasks you'll be doing today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How does it look on your side?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How does it look on your side?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How does it look on your side?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No problems. I don't think the water pipe is clogged.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No problems. I don't think the water pipe is clogged.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No problems. I don't think the water pipe is clogged.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, there is a high possibility that the cause of the pool water not coming out is a malfunction in the water supply system.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, there is a high possibility that the cause of the pool water not coming out is a malfunction in the water supply system.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, there is a high possibility that the cause of the pool water not coming out is a malfunction in the water supply system.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the AI's down and we can't do a remote inspection, we'll have to go into the facility and check it out ourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the AI's down and we can't do a remote inspection, we'll have to go into the facility and check it out ourselves.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I'll take a look inside!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll take a look inside!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's going to be pitch-dark without any lights. Won't you be scared of being all alone in there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's going to be pitch-dark without any lights. Won't you be scared of being all alone in there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's going to be pitch-dark without any lights. Won't you be scared of being all alone in there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all right. I'm used to places like this, so it's actually quite comfortable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all right. I'm used to places like this, so it's actually quite comfortable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all right. I'm used to places like this, so it's actually quite comfortable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I see. So Kaci's not the type to get startled when a scary monster jumps out from the dark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I see. So Kaci's not the type to get startled when a scary monster jumps out from the dark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I see. So Kaci's not the type to get startled when a scary monster jumps out from the dark.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, now that you say it like that, I'm scared.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm in. What should I do next?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Move along the pipe and you'll see a panel that can be manually operated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Move along the pipe and you'll see a panel that can be manually operated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Move along the pipe and you'll see a panel that can be manually operated.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's... darker and more spacious in here than I thought.

root.m_Talk_FRA: A boogeyman might reach his hand out to you from the dark.

root.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on?

root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I heard something coming from inside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: do you think... I can win?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, I think it would be best if you don't punch it.

root.m_Talk_DEU: KYAAAH!! Something just moved above my head...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: It was just a bird that flew out of the facility.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's this...?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did you find the operation panel?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? That's a bird's nest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it cute? There are even tiny eggs in it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it cute? There are even tiny eggs in it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it cute? There are even tiny eggs in it.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Well at least we now know that the bio signals weren't from a boogeyman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well at least we now know that the bio signals weren't from a boogeyman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, did you really believe me? You're so naive, Kaci.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, did you really believe me? You're so naive, Kaci.

root.m_Talk_DEU: D-don't make fun of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-don't make fun of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... how did a bird even build a nest in a place like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... how did a bird even build a nest in a place like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... how did a bird even build a nest in a place like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm guessing it came here looking for a safe place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm guessing it came here looking for a safe place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm guessing it came here looking for a safe place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although birds usually build their nests in trees with lush leaves, there aren't many good trees these days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although birds usually build their nests in trees with lush leaves, there aren't many good trees these days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although birds usually build their nests in trees with lush leaves, there aren't many good trees these days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... I learned that in class. The lack of trees is... because of the Counterside Effect, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... I learned that in class. The lack of trees is... because of the Counterside Effect, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... I learned that in class. The lack of trees is... because of the Counterside Effect, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! That's correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! That's correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! That's correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though our generation never experienced it directly, the ecosystem is said to have changed a lot ever since the Counterside Effect occurred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though our generation never experienced it directly, the ecosystem is said to have changed a lot ever since the Counterside Effect occurred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though our generation never experienced it directly, the ecosystem is said to have changed a lot ever since the Counterside Effect occurred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There used to be migratory birds that would fly in flocks relocating to warmer climates, but with the seasons all mixed up, it's something you can't see these days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There used to be migratory birds that would fly in flocks relocating to warmer climates, but with the seasons all mixed up, it's something you can't see these days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There used to be migratory birds that would fly in flocks relocating to warmer climates, but with the seasons all mixed up, it's something you can't see these days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's a shame that there aren't enough trees for birds to comfortably rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's a shame that there aren't enough trees for birds to comfortably rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's a shame that there aren't enough trees for birds to comfortably rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it's the same for people. We also don't have enough places to live. That's what the world has come to.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it's the same for people. We also don't have enough places to live. That's what the world has come to.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it's the same for people. We also don't have enough places to live. That's what the world has come to.

root.m_Talk_DEU: What should I do with the nest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What should I do with the nest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll have to remove it if we want to fix the facility.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll have to remove it if we want to fix the facility.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll have to remove it if we want to fix the facility.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Shouldn't we move it to somewhere safer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Shouldn't we move it to somewhere safer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That won't help. Once the mother bird feels threatened and leaves, it is unlikely to return.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That won't help. Once the mother bird feels threatened and leaves, it is unlikely to return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see.

Oh, you're back. Great work, you two

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, Kaci went off on her own saying that she was busy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, Kaci went off on her own saying that she was busy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, Kaci went off on her own saying that she was busy.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

root.m_Talk_FRA: E-Edith? When did you get here?

root.m_Talk_DEU: I came to give you some snacks from the Student President.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I came to give you some snacks from the Student President.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Those eggs, you didn't throw them away.

root.m_Talk_FRA: If you keep feeling responsible for every little thing, it's going to get only harder for you.

root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what do I do...? I didn't think about that and searched the internet for making an incubator... I feel silly now.

root.m_Talk_DEU: What I mean is, don't get too discouraged if the eggs don't hatch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I mean is, don't get too discouraged if the eggs don't hatch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not your fault that the eggs were left behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not your fault that the eggs were left behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not your fault that the eggs were left behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your concern, Edith.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your concern, Edith.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your concern, Edith.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... if it does hatch, we'll need a tree for it to live on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... if it does hatch, we'll need a tree for it to live on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... if it does hatch, we'll need a tree for it to live on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... guess so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... guess so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... guess so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It has wings, so... I want it to live in a bigger place than inside a bird cage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It has wings, so... I want it to live in a bigger place than inside a bird cage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It has wings, so... I want it to live in a bigger place than inside a bird cage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have a good idea, then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have a good idea, then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have a good idea, then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A good idea?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A good idea?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A good idea?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... the Academy's backyard...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... the Academy's backyard...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... the Academy's backyard...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's so spacious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's so spacious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's so spacious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. But it's empty with nothing but dirt. Nothing has grown here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. But it's empty with nothing but dirt. Nothing has grown here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. But it's empty with nothing but dirt. Nothing has grown here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From now on, I'll leave you, the leader of the Flower Arrangement Club, in charge of this place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From now on, I'll leave you, the leader of the Flower Arrangement Club, in charge of this place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From now on, I'll leave you, the leader of the Flower Arrangement Club, in charge of this place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Are you sure that's all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Are you sure that's all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Are you sure that's all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. You can plant flowers and trees as you like here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. You can plant flowers and trees as you like here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. You can plant flowers and trees as you like here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'll take some time before the trees are tall enough for birds to make nests and rest on them, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'll take some time before the trees are tall enough for birds to make nests and rest on them, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'll take some time before the trees are tall enough for birds to make nests and rest on them, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything starts slow and from a sprout.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything starts slow and from a sprout.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything starts slow and from a sprout.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! I'll do my best to grow them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I'll do my best to grow them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll do my best to grow them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Flowers! Trees! And... even the baby birds!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Flowers! Trees! And... even the baby birds!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Flowers! Trees! And... even the baby birds!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then it's settled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then it's settled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then it's settled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, you handed the responsibility of taking care of the backyard to Kaci?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...And so, you handed the responsibility of taking care of the backyard to Kaci?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...And so, you handed the responsibility of taking care of the backyard to Kaci?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! Even if you're that lazy! How can you let just one elementary school student be in charge of that large piece of land?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon! Even if you're that lazy! How can you let just one elementary school student be in charge of that large piece of land?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! Even if you're that lazy! How can you let just one elementary school student be in charge of that large piece of land?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn* I don't have a green thumb.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn* I don't have a green thumb.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn* I don't have a green thumb.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And everyone... has their own aptitude.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And everyone... has their own aptitude.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And everyone... has their own aptitude.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* What a lousy excuse...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* What a lousy excuse...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* What a lousy excuse...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't think this is right. We should withdraw the decision and
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't think this is right. We should withdraw the decision and
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't think this is right. We should withdraw the decision and
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see how she does first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see how she does first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see how she does first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Student President?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Student President?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Student President?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But she's only an elementary school student.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But she's only an elementary school student.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But she's only an elementary school student.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Counter Academy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Counter Academy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Counter Academy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she wants to do it, then I think it's best to give her more opportunities to discover what her strengths are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she wants to do it, then I think it's best to give her more opportunities to discover what her strengths are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she wants to do it, then I think it's best to give her more opportunities to discover what her strengths are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, if you say so, I won't disagree, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, if you say so, I won't disagree, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, if you say so, I won't disagree, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Edith! You didn't coax her because you were too lazy to do it, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Edith! You didn't coax her because you were too lazy to do it, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Edith! You didn't coax her because you were too lazy to do it, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn*

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's already asleep?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's already asleep?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's already asleep?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wake up! We still have work to do!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wake up! We still have work to do!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wake up! We still have work to do!
